kw.doc: Verifies that the current page title equals ``title``.

kw.name: Run Keywords
Cleanup Test User
Run Keyword And Return Status
Page Should Contain Element
kw.msg: Page should have contained element 'xpath=//a[contains(text(),'Delete Account')]' but did not.
kw.doc: Verifies that element ``locator`` is found on the current page.
kw.status: Page should have contained element 'xpath=//a[contains(text(),'Delete Account')]' but did not.

kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with given arguments and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Return Status
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with given arguments and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.name: Log
kw.arg: Native click failed on Delete Account; trying JS click fallback.
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Execute Javascript
kw.doc: Executes the given JavaScript code with possible arguments.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Return Status
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with given arguments and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.name: Log
kw.arg: Account deletion confirmation not visible; continuing without failing teardown.
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Log
kw.arg: Delete Account link not found, skipping cleanup.
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.
Deletes the current account if logged in.

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.
Executes all the given keywords in a sequence.
